sources.excerpt: The owner-domain homepage identifies Asia Garden at 6935 Telegraph Rd, Alexandria, VA 22310, phone 703-922-6666, and links the current ordering menu on the same domain.
notes: This page establishes restaurant and location identity plus the restaurant-controlled link to the ordering vendor; it does not publish an allergen guide.

sources.excerpt: The current lunch surface exposes 36 actual Lunch Special product records in its embedded rawMenus payload and independently embeds the same complete two-menu boundary as the all-day surface.
notes: Actual menuItemName, menuItemDesc, image, size, and modifier-template fields are retained as the reproducible product boundary.
This restaurant-linked ordering menu is not promoted to a restaurant-issued allergen guide or complete ingredient disclosure.
The page embeds cachedAIMenuItemDesc data; those generated descriptions are explicitly excluded from published product descriptions and allergen evidence.

sources.excerpt: The complete embedded rawMenus payload contains 36 lunch and 206 all-day presentations across 21 consumer groups. Forty-six products have a raw ordering description; a separate cachedAIMenuItemDesc map contains 154 generated descriptions that are excluded.
notes: The raw menu contains 242 unique menuItemId values and all referenced positive modifier-template IDs resolve in the same payload.
Lunch, main, dinner-combo, and party-tray presentations remain distinct because the source sells them separately.
Duplicate display names in different sections receive category-qualified internal IDs rather than being dropped.
Beverages and Soda are moved to the end of the consumer ordering while all non-beverage source group and item order is preserved.

No official allergen matrix, complete ingredient disclosure, or cross-contact statement appears in the captured source. Menu titles and the 46 raw descriptions remain labeled Ingredient Intelligence context only.
